{{Infobox group
| name = Miners
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The Miners are a small, specialized order within the [[Consultants]], consisting of only forty-two students. They serve as the organization's archivists, responsible for maintaining and organizing the extensive records that constitute the true wealth of the [[Consultants]]. Because they manage sensitive personnel data for [[Gray Island]], members of this order are bound by strict oaths of secrecy. As part of the [[Consultants' Guild{{!}}Consultant Guild]], they are characterized by a disciplined nature, typically following orders precisely and remaining silent unless required by a contract. While they are one of the four primary orders, they are often overlooked compared to others like the [[Architects]] or [[Masons]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Miners]] reside in catacombs.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Miners]] observed that [[Rudeus Maxwell]] was a nobody.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The final action report was sent to the [[Miners]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Miners]] had sealed the vaults.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Miners]] go inside the [[Transcendent Ruins]] to draw [[scales]] from the air.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
[[Category:Amalgam]]
